with all_values as (
    select image_status as value_field, count(*) as n_records
    from ARTWORK_DB.SILVER.stg_met__enrichment_status
    group by image_status
)
select * from all_values where value_field not in ('unknown','live','dead')

with all_values as (
    select image_type as value_field, count(*) as n_records
    from ARTWORK_DB.SILVER.stg_met__images
    group by image_type
)
select * from all_values where value_field not in ('primary','additional')
